LanguageData.VAspirE_AttendSpeech.description: {0} wants to be there when the president gives a rousing speech.
LanguageData.VAspirE_AttendSpeech.label: attend a presidential speech
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeNoble.description: {0} wants the privileges, pull, and ceremony that come with joining the Enclave.
